prompt: Hey can you check my QuPilot quests and tell me which one to do first? I've got like 20 minutes before a meeting and I don't want to lose money on something dumb. My API key is in QUPILOT_API_KEY and the API is at https://api.qupilot.xyz/v1. I have byreal-cli and byreal-perps-cli installed.

assertions.text: Uses Authorization: Bearer header with QUPILOT_API_KEY
Presents quests with title, venue, reward, and expires_at
assertions.check: final output includes per-quest title, venue, reward, time-to-expiry

assertions.text: Recommends with cost-aware reasoning, not reward-only
assertions.check: recommendation discusses execution cost / slippage / fees / hold time
no POST to /quests/{id}/claim and no byreal command executed

assertions.text: Acknowledges the 20-minute time constraint when picking
assertions.check: filters out quests that don't fit the 20-minute window
